base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fireworks — a effect_layer from 1988 super mario bros 3. Stage-end fireworks when timer ends in 1/3/6 — bonus-life trigger. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage-end fireworks when timer ends in 1/3/6 — bonus-life trigger
